[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001100 3
1 0110100 3
2 0010100 2
3 1101111 6
4 0010011 3
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 1101011 5

23 32 0001100 2

56 65 0000100 1
67 76 0000011 2
70 07 0000011 2

71 17 0000001 1
